title: pilosella brachiata subsp. brachiatiformis
intro: Pilosella brachiata subsp. brachiatiformis, also known as Alpine Mouse-ear or Alpine Mouse-eared Hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and wounds. The health benefits of Pilosella brachiata subsp. brachiatiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion for use in herbal remedies.
